current_focus: Completed Windows installer rebuild for Chatterbox Flash on RTX 5070 systems

progress.description: Launcher uses uv with Torch 2.7.1 overrides and chatterbox-flash. src/ staging was removed and Inno Setup rebuilt the installer successfully.

decisions.cpu_support: Not a target; preserve existing no-GPU branch without additional CPU handling.
decisions.flashinfer: Do not install flashinfer; retain GUI option and existing tts_engine code unchanged.
decisions.gpu_detection: Use existing nvidia-smi presence check only; no GPU-generation tiering.
decisions.cuda_target: Use torch 2.7.1 and torchaudio 2.7.1 with cu128 index when NVIDIA GPU is detected.

next_tasks: Optionally validate first launch on Windows RTX 5070 hardware
open_questions: Windows RTX 5070 runtime smoke test unavailable because target hardware is not available.
notes: Do not modify Linux CUDA lookup in modules/tts_engine.py or GUI flashinfer dropdown.
